title: Endless Boomerangs
description: Adds boomerangs made from most woods and ores, including prismarine. All return when thrown.
body: This datapack adds a wide variety of boomerangs to Minecraft, crafted from all types of wood, stone, iron, copper, gold, diamond, netherite, and prismarine. Each boomerang can be enhanced with unique powerful enchantments: Rencor, which pierces through a mob and strikes again from behind; Havy Wind, which inflicts slowness on the enemy; Whirlwind, which creates a tornado pulling entities in and dealing damage per second; and Chain, which makes the boomerang bounce in a chain to hit nearby mobs.
